text:
Dear Team

I am facing issue with Kernel panic while installing FreeBSD 9.1 i386 in my server.

Please find the details of Hardware specification below:

MBD - Supermicro X9SRI-F
Bios Version - 3.0

CPU - 1 x Xeon E5 2640
RAM - 4 x 4Gb ECC REG 1600MHz
HDD - 1 x 1TB Maxtor

Please find attachment file of error

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
